name: independent insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For independent insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient claims processing causes delayed settlements. We provide an analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient claims processing leads to delayed settlements.
